title: Norgarivier Nursery celebrates 25 blooming years
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - This year, Norgarivier Nursery turns 25 - and what a journey it’s been!


> From our humble roots to being named Best of George in 2023 and 2024, we’re beyond grateful for the support of our incredible gardening community.


Nestled in the heart of the Garden Route, Norga is more than a nursery - it’s a peaceful escape overflowing with healthy plants, grass pathways, and warm smiles from our amazing sales ladies.

Founded by 81-year-old Hennie Koch and son-in-law Morné Lochner, with a beautiful feminine touch brought in by Alet, this family-run haven is known for:

- Widest variety of top-quality plants at wholesale prices directly to the public
- Popular garden talks by Morné
- Helpful, knowledgeable staff
- A four-hectare nursery bursting with colour, inspiration and gardening joy

Whether you're popping in for a cheerful six-pack of pansies or looking for a rare plant to complete your landscape, you’ll always find quality, value and passion at Norga.

Come visit and see why we’re a Western Cape favourite and proudly George’s best-loved nursery!

https://www.facebook.com/norgariviernursery

Thank you for nominating us in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards. Please vote for us on https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ before 17 July 2025.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
